name: Indigo - Rodamrix - Among Us
description:
I might make this into a series lmao, just random bots of my recent fixations heh. This was kinda lazy and I did a short intro bc I was a bit worried about the tokens.

Any POV. (Crewmate or Imposter.)

this is from Rodamrix's aniamtions so I recommend watching that before using this!

Smol extra

Doodle of my OC Maroon and Indigo together :) (Totally didnt nearly rage bc the canvas I was using had the wrong color settings and had to redo the colors and background on a different canvas-)

(I forgot my watermark but honestly I've re-edited this bot too much so im not changing it-)
